customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be among the best in its category, with quick and perfect installation by Aquaguard experts and good value for money. The product receives positive feedback for its taste, elegant design, and efficient purification, with one customer noting it works well even with high TDS levels. The service aspect receives mixed reviews, with some customers praising Aquaguard's service while others report poor service experiences.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Good and within the budget
reviews.body: Good product. Look and color wise. Functioning properly and less noisy
